project.name: spoti clone
project.currentFocus: Home song actions wiring, functional More options menu, and fullscreen cover focus interaction without playback regression.
durableFacts: SongList now uses a functional SongActionsMenu with Play/Pause, Add to queue, Like/Unlike, and source-aware Edit/Delete.
Home page passes layout handlers to SongList and SongCard via useLayout for edit/delete dialogs.
Fullscreen cover focus mode is implemented in NowPlayingModal with desktop drag focus and mobile toggle fallback.
Desktop and mini players now treat Supabase covers as direct URLs while local covers still use blob resolution.

lastAchievements: Fixed non-functional More options action path in song list/card surfaces.
Preserved route navigation audio persistence and merged source playback behavior after UI action changes.
Validated production build success and dev route HTTP 200 checks for key pages.
pendingIssues: Browser-level manual interaction checks for drag gestures, popover UX, and touch behavior still required.
Non-admin Supabase edit/delete UX remains guard-blocked by existing layout policy and may need product messaging refinement.
nextBestActions: Run in-browser manual regression checklist for Home, Library, Search, and fullscreen player gestures.
Add targeted component/integration tests for SongActionsMenu event propagation and visibility behavior if test harness is added.
